description: Returns the next branch connected to a bus, excluding three-winding transformers. Each time ‘NXTBRN_2’ is called it returns the next branch in either numeric or alphabetic ascending order, depending on the PSSE bus output option setting. ‘INIBRN_2’ or ‘INIBRX_2’ must first be called to establish the from bus number. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.2.0. ierr, jbus, jsect, ckt = nxtbrn_2(ibus, inode)
python_syntax: ierr, jbus, jsect, ckt = nxtbrn_2(ibus, inode)

error_codes.description: no more branches from ‘IBUS’ and ‘INODE’; ‘JBUS’, ‘JSECT’ is returned set to 0, and ‘CKT’ returned set to spaces.
‘INIBRN_2’ or ‘INIBRX_2’ was not called for node ‘INODE’ of bus ‘IBUS’; ‘JBUS’, and ‘CKT’ are unchanged.
